'''dajava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cyanopeptide|cyanopeptide]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-j-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cyanopeptide|cyanopeptide]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dajava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæjævæth|dæjævæth]] || [[word:dæjævæj|dæjævæj]] || [[word:dæjævæsh|dæjævæsh]] || [[word:dæjævæ|dæjævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dajajavath|dajajavath]] || [[word:dajajavaj|dajajavaj]] || [[word:dajajavash|dajajavash]] || [[word:dajajava|dajajava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dajavath|dajavath]] || [[word:dajavaj|dajavaj]] || [[word:dajavash|dajavash]] || [[word:dajava|dajava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dajafvath|dajafvath]] || [[word:dajafvaj|dajafvaj]] || [[word:dajafvash|dajafvash]] || [[word:dajafvaf|dajafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dajavatha|dajavatha]] || [[word:dajavaja|dajavaja]] || [[word:dajavasha|dajavasha]] || [[word:dajavaka|dajavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dajavath|dajavath]] || [[word:dajavaj|dajavaj]] || [[word:dajavash|dajavash]] || [[word:dajava|dajava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dajavathal|dajavathal]] || [[word:dajavajal|dajavajal]] || [[word:dajavashal|dajavashal]] || [[word:dajavakal|dajavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dajavathatha|dajavathatha]] || [[word:dajavajaja|dajavajaja]] || [[word:dajavashasha|dajavashasha]] || [[word:dajavaka|dajavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dajavathan|dajavathan]] || [[word:dajavajan|dajavajan]] || [[word:dajavashan|dajavashan]] || [[word:dajavakan|dajavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dajavathaoro|dajavathaoro]] || [[word:dajavajaoro|dajavajaoro]] || [[word:dajavashaoro|dajavashaoro]] || [[word:dajavakaoro|dajavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
